scripts.build: echo "const SERVER_URL = '$AZURE_SERVER_IP'; const firebaseConfig = { apiKey: '$FB_API_KEY', authDomain: '$FB_AUTH_DOMAIN', projectId: '$FB_PROJECT_ID', storageBucket: '$FB_STORAGE_BUCKET', messagingSenderId: '$FB_MESSAGING_ID', appId: '$FB_APP_ID', measurementId: '$FB_MEASUREMENT_ID' };" > config.js
